questions.q: What recent action by Amazon, as reported on April 11, 2026, has led to user outcry?
options: Ending support for older Kindle devices
Increasing the price of all Kindle e-readers
Removing popular book titles from the Kindle store
Requiring a new subscription service for all Kindle users
questions.correctText: Ending support for older Kindle devices

questions.q: Which two organizations were reported on April 11, 2026, to have prevailed in a fight to protect libraries and museums nationwide?
